goal: Prepare a read-only release-readiness report from repository evidence without tagging, publishing, or changing external state.

nodes.label: Select release evidence areas
nodes.prompt: Return at most four bounded release-readiness evidence areas as JSON {"items":[{"id":"...","task":"..."}]}. Include version consistency, deterministic gates, documentation, and artifact privacy. Do not change state.

nodes.label: Inspect release evidence independently
nodes.prompt: Inspect only this evidence area. Return exact repository evidence, pass or fail status, uncertainty, and a deterministic verification command. Do not tag, publish, modify files, or access credentials.

nodes.label: Verify release readiness report
nodes.prompt: Try to disprove every readiness claim against the cited repository files and commands. Return JSON with accepted and reasons. This verifies preparation only and must not release anything.
